response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is technically accomplished with strong TypeScript, full-stack JavaScript, and cloud infrastructure experience that aligns with the stack requirements, and he even covers several nice-to-have areas (LLM integration, Kubernetes). However, he is a Staff/Senior engineer with over 15 years of professional experience, which makes him severely overqualified for an entry-level Junior/Mid role. Hiring at this level creates near-certain risks of rapid attrition, salary misalignment, and underutilization. Additionally, the resume shows no explicit PostgreSQL or NestJS experience, which are core requirements for this position.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise demonstrated across multiple production roles including high-throughput and pricing-critical systems
Covers multiple nice-to-have qualifications: LLM/AI-agent work, Kubernetes deployment, and AWS-adjacent cloud tooling
Consistent full-stack delivery track record spanning frontend (React, Ember.js) and backend API development
concerns: Massively overqualified: 15+ years at Staff/Senior level is fundamentally incompatible with an entry-level Junior/Mid position in terms of seniority, compensation, and career trajectory
No explicit PostgreSQL or NestJS experience mentioned — the two most specific technical requirements of this role are absent from the resume
All employment history lists 'Kenya' as the location despite the candidate being based in Berlin, suggesting a resume data inconsistency that raises data-quality questions about the application
